reasoning: Without real-time data for 2025, I rely on base rates. Bad Bunny was the top artist globally on Spotify from 2020-2022. However, he was unseated by Taylor Swift in 2023. Swift's daily stream volumes and massive catalog typically position her as the strong favorite for any given year, while The Weeknd also holds tremendous regular streaming power. It is unlikely for Bad Bunny to reclaim the top spot without a massive and perfectly timed blockbuster release, though his baseline streams keep him in the top 3-5. Therefore, I estimate his chances around 12%.
